hypothesis: If a multi-agent LLM-based system autonomously extracts literature-based force-field parameters and configures zeolite adsorption simulations across varying adsorbates, structures, and simulation types, then the extracted parameters and generated inputs will be correct and reproducible across repeated runs and will yield adsorption isotherms and heats of adsorption that agree with manual evaluations and with RASPA results because of cross-validation with publications, libraries, and direct execution checks.
